title: elaphoglossum viridifolium
intro: Elaphoglossum viridifolium, also known as the Green Elaphoglossum or Green Lipfern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Central and South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum viridifolium include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
